channel_targets:

name: pyseobnr

about.summary: Gravitational wave modelling within the effective-one-body framework
Gravitational wave modelling within the effective-one-body framework

raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: pyseobnr
  version: 0.3.6
  # choose the oldest scipy possible, to maximise compatibility with user environments
  scipy_version: "1.17"
  scipy_version_v312: "1.13"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/pyseobnr-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 46508432709e637e6661252b55675bfb002a4425b770bb94b0bb4194ccdc5b97
  patches:
    - nolalsuite-in-pyproject.patch

build:
  number: 1
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  skip:
    - win

requirements:
  build:
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib("c") }}
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - cython
        - numpy
        - python
        - if: match(python, ">=3.13")
          then: scipy ${{ scipy_version }}.*
          else: scipy ${{ scipy_version_v312 }}.*
  host:
    - cython
    - numpy
    - pip
    - python
    - if: match(python, ">=3.13")
      then: scipy ${{ scipy_version }}.*
      else: scipy ${{ scipy_version_v312 }}.*
    - setuptools
    - setuptools-scm >=3.4.3
    - wheel
  run:
    - h5py
    - numba
    - numexpr
    - numpy >=1.23.0
    - pygsl_lite
    - python
    - python-lal
    - python-lalsimulation
    - qnm
    - ${{ pin_compatible('scipy') }}
    - scri
    - setuptools

tests:
  - files:
      source:
        - test/
    requirements:
      run:
        - pip
        - pytest
        - pandas
        - pycbc
        - if: match(python, "<3.11")
          then: setuptools <82.0.0a0
    script:
      - python -m pip show pyseobnr
      - python -m pytest test/ -ra

about:
  summary: Gravitational wave modelling within the effective-one-body framework
  homepage: https://git.ligo.org/waveforms/software/pyseobnr
  repository: https://git.ligo.org/waveforms/software/pyseobnr
  documentation: https://waveforms.docs.ligo.org/software/pyseobnr/
  license: GPL-3.0-or-later
  license_file: LICENSE

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - duncanmmacleod
    - lorenzopompili00
    - raffienficiaud
